original: These single-use flash grenades are valuable self-defense and escape tools, allowing you to quickly evade an opponent or exploit his blindness and attack with near impunity.
Pulling the pin on a grenade without a target to throw it at would be pretty dumb now, wouldn’t it?
{var0}+{var1}+" considers it unwise to use a grenade outside of combat.
